nasb.text: And all the people of Judah took Uzziah, who was sixteen years old, and made him king in the place of his father Amaziah.

esv.text: And all the people of Judah took Uzziah, who was sixteen years old, and made him king instead of his father Amaziah.

cnv.text: 全猶大的人民立烏西雅接續他的父親亞瑪謝作王，那時他才十六歲。

ccb.text: 全体犹大人立十六岁的乌西雅为王，继承他父亲亚玛谢的王位。
